result.summary: Icons8 exposes a documented HTTP Icons API plus an SSE MCP server for icon retrieval; the API uses an Icons8 API key, while the MCP server supports free PNG access and paid Bearer-token access for SVG.
result.description: Icons8 provides downloadable design assets such as icons, illustrations, photos, music, and related design tools. Its developer offering includes APIs and an MCP server for searching and retrieving icon assets.

icons8_api_key.label: Icons8 API key
icons8_api_key.setup: Subscribe to an Icons8 API plan on the [API Pricing](https://developers.icons8.com/pricing) page or contact Icons8 for enterprise access. The MCP docs also say paid users can get a key from the [MCP tab](https://icons8.com/profile/summary/mcp) in their Icons8 account after subscribing. The developer docs state requests must include the key either as an `Api-Key` header or `token` query parameter.
